skill.name: ucsd-branding
skill.description: Apply UC San Diego's official visual identity (colors, typography, masthead motif, accessibility rules) to a web app, email templates, or documents. Use when asked to brand a UI as UC San Diego / UCSD, apply campus branding, or check brand compliance. Covers Tailwind/shadcn token mapping, fonts, and what requires licensed assets.
skill.body:
# UC San Diego branding Authoritative values live in [references/brand-spec.md](references/brand-spec.md) (verified against brand.ucsd.edu). Read it before applying anything. If asked about an edge case the spec doesn't cover, check brand.ucsd.edu rather than guessing — hex codes and usage rules are strict. ## Core rules (always apply) 1. **UC San Diego Blue `#00629B` is the required, dominant color.** Buttons, links, focus rings, primary chart series. Accents (Turquoise, Magenta, Green, Orange, Citron) stay secondary — never dominant. 2. **Navy `#182B49` for text and mastheads**, not black. Headers/wordmark on navy with a **Gold `#C69214` rule** is the recognizable campus web motif. 3. **Yellow `#FFCD00` sparingly** — active/highlight accents, or as the primary action color on navy/dark surfaces (the brand's highest-contrast pairing). 4. **Typography**: Brix Sans is the licensed primary — do NOT bundle it without a license. Use **Roboto** (the designated free substitute, Google Fonts), falling back to Helvetica Neue/Helvetica/Arial. 5. **Accessibility**: WCAG AA — text contrast ≥ 4.5:1. UCSD Blue and Navy pass on white; Yellow/Citron NEVER as text on white; darken Cool Gray to ≈#5D6066 for small muted text. 6. **Logos are licensed assets.** Never fabricate or trace the campus logo; use a text wordmark ("UC San Diego" bold + unit name) until the official SVG is downloaded from brand.ucsd.edu and dropped into the project. ## Applying to a Tailwind v4 / shadcn app Map theme tokens in `globals.css` (full mapping with exact values in the spec's "shadcn token mapping" section): - `--primary` → UCSD Blue, `--foreground` → Navy, `--secondary`/`--muted` → Sand-tinted neutrals, `--border` → stone-tinted hairline, `--ring` → Blue - Sidebar/masthead tokens → Navy background, light foreground, Yellow active accent, gold border rule - Charts → Blue, Turquoise, Gold, Magenta, Green (in that order) - Dark mode → navy-anchored background (#0E1A30), Yellow as `--primary` with Navy foreground - Define the raw palette as `--ucsd-*` CSS variables so components can reference brand colors directly (e.g. `border-(--ucsd-gold)`) ## Page chrome — match Decorator 5, not an invented motif Ground truth source: `https://developer.ucsd.edu/design/v5-kitchen-sink/` and `https://cdn.ucsd.edu/cms/decorator-5/styles/base.min.css` (verified June 2026 by reading the actual source CSS). ### Verified Decorator 5 chrome stack (top to bottom) **1. `.layout-header` wrapper** - `background-color: #2b92b9` (medium blue strip behind the white title bar) - Contains `.layout-title` and optionally `.layout-login` **2. `.layout-title` — the white site-name band** - `background: #fff`, `height: 92px`, `padding: 1.5em 0` - `font-family: Roboto, sans-serif` - Left: `.title-header` link — `color: #000`, `font-size: 1.35rem`, `letter-spacing: 1px`, `text-transform: uppercase`, `float: left` - Hover/focus: `color: #666` - Two variants: `.title-header-large` (desktop, `margin-top: 5px`) and `.title-header-short` (mobile abbreviation, `display: none` on desktop) - Right: `.title-logo` — image-replaced sprite link to ucsd.edu, `width: 229px; height: 65px`, `float: right`, `text-indent: -999em`, background from `sprite_base.png` at position `0 -3px` - Hidden below ~560px (mobile shows a small logo in the navbar-header instead) **3. `.navbar` / `.navbar-default` — the UCSD Blue navigation bar** - `background-color: #00629b`, `min-height: 50px`, `border-bottom: none` - Nav links: `color: #fff`, `padding: 9px 15px` - Hover/active/open state: `background-color: #004268` (darker blue) - **Gold active-tab underline**: `border-bottom: 3px solid #ffcd00` on `.active > a` - Search toggle button on far right - Mobile: hamburger toggle (`background-color: #00629b`, white icon-bars), UCSD logo image shown in navbar-header on xs screens only **4. `.layout-main`** — `width: 100%`, no background (inherits page bg) **5. `.footer` / `.layout-footer` — the UCSD Blue footer** - `background-color: #00629b`, `color: #fff`, `font-size: 90%` - `border-top: 1px solid #ccc` - Left column (`.col-sm-8`): address line + copyright + `.footer-links` list - Footer links: `color: #fff`, `text-decoration: underline`, pipe-separated via `border-right: 1px solid #fff` - Right column (`.col-sm-4`): `.footer-logo` image (`width: 158px; height: 30px; float: right`) — white UCSD wordmark logo from `https://cdn.ucsd.edu/developer/decorator/5.0.2/img/ucsd-footer-logo-white.png` - Optional `.prefooter` band above footer: `background-color: #f1f1f2`, `color: #182b49`, used for supplemental nav/contact links ### Key corrections vs. prior skill version - The **gold rule is NOT a structural header border**. It appears only as the `border-bottom: 3px solid #ffcd00` on the **active nav tab** in the blue navbar. There is no gold rule at the bottom of the white `.layout-title` band. - The **footer is UCSD Blue `#00629b`**, not navy `#182b49`. - The **`.layout-header` outer wrapper is `#2b92b9`** (medium blue), not white or navy. - **Teko SemiBold** is used for h1/h2 headings (`color: #00629b` for h1, `color: #182b49` for h2), loaded from `cdn.ucsd.edu/cms/decorator-5/styles/teko.css`. Body and UI text use **Roboto**. Keep Teko surgical — headings only. - `.layout-container`: `max-width: 1200px` (capped at 960px below 1200px viewport), `width: 98%`, `margin: 0 auto`. ### Logo assets (from CDN — do not redraw) - Header sprite: `https://cdn.ucsd.edu/cms/decorator-5/styles/img/sprite_base.png` (and `sprite_base2x.png` for retina) - Footer wordmark: `https://cdn.ucsd.edu/developer/decorator/5.0.2/img/ucsd-footer-logo-white.png` ### HTML structure skeleton ```html
Site Name Short UC San Diego
…
…

UC San Diego 9500 Gilman Dr. La Jolla, CA 92093 (858) 534-2230
Copyright © 2026 Regents of the University of California. All rights reserved.

    …
``` Emails (inline styles, no CSS vars): UCSD Blue `#00629b` header strip, Navy `#182b49` headings, `#00629b` buttons, Sand `#F5F0E6` page background, Roboto/Helvetica stack. ## Verify after applying Check the four highest-visibility surfaces: sign-in page, any public-facing page, the app shell/sidebar, and one email template. Confirm: blue (`#00629b`) dominates, black site title text in white band, gold underline on active nav tab only, no yellow-on-white text, footer is blue (not navy), focus rings visible.
